word: H634 - אֵסַר־חַדֹּון - ʼÊçar-Chaddôwn - ay-sar' Chad-dohn' - Esar-haddon

sections.paragraph:
Original: אסר־חדּון

Transliteration: 'êsar-chaddôn

Phonetic: ay-sar' Chad-dohn'

BDB Definition:

Esarhaddon = "Ashur has given a brother"
  1. king of Assyria in the seventh-century BC

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
